introSection: Family Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Yubei, Chongqing, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a figure-8 helix, and travels backwards.

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Yubei, Chongqing, China.

The ride has a figure-8 helix, and travels backwards.
